zh.Killed In Battle At Strathbogie, Scotlan: 蘇格蘭班福爾斯特拉斯賀波吉

zh.lifeSummary: 當Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland於1058年出生在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾時，她的父親Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Moray11055歲，母親Fimmghuala De Angus24歲。她於大約1088年與Aethelred Lay Abbot of Dunkeld在蘇格蘭費伏結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1097年在蘇格蘭費伏梅爾享年40歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏包福 本 費伏。

zh-hans.Killed In Battle At Strathbogie, Scotlan: 苏格兰班福爾斯特拉斯賀波吉
zh-hans.Bow of Fife, Fife, Scotland: 苏格兰費伏包福 本 費伏
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland于1058年出生在苏格兰艾爾金爾时，她的父亲Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Moray11055岁，母亲Fimmghuala De Angus24岁。她于大约1088年与Aethelred Lay Abbot of Dunkeld在苏格兰費伏结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1097年在苏格兰費伏梅爾享年40岁，埋葬在苏格兰費伏包福 本 費伏。

nameMeanings.name: MacDuff,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDuff
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duibh, a patronymic from the personal name or byname Dubh ‘black, dark-haired, swarthy’. Compare Duff .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Scotland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Scotland, Scolland. Found in Normandy as well as England, it evidently denoted a Scot or someone with an association with Scotland.
ethnic name for someone from Scotland, from Middle English Scotlond ‘Scotland’. Compare England .

variants.name: England
meanings: English: habitational name from Middle English Engelond ‘England’. It was probably a formal alternative to English , which is also well evidenced as a surname in England. These names may have been acquired by English landowners who moved in Norman social circles or who lived in a neighbouring country (Scotland, Wales, or Ireland), or by English merchants who traded abroad.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farmsteads so named, from Old Norse eng ‘meadow’ + land ‘land’.
Swedish: ornamental name with the same meaning as 2.

nameMeanings.name: Tul
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered short form of Terry or Terence , of recent origin. For the substitution of -l for -r, compare Hal .

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

variants.name: Thor
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

nameMeanings.name: Orlin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Rivka, Hyman.
Jewish (from Lithuania): habitational name from any of the places in Lithuania or Belarus called Orlany or Orlya.

en.lifeSummary: When Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland was born in 1058, in Elginshire, Scotland, her father, Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Moray, was 11055 and her mother, Fimmghuala De Angus, was 24. She married Aethelred Lay Abbot of Dunkeld about 1088, in Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died about 1097, in Methil, Fife, Scotland, at the age of 40, and was buried in Bow of Fife, Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland est née en 1058, à Elginshire, Écosse, son père, Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Moray, avait 11055 ans et sa mère, Fimmghuala De Angus, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Aethelred Lay Abbot of Dunkeld environ 1088, à Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1097, à Methil, Fife, Écosse, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Bow of Fife, Fife, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland 1058 in Elginshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Moray 11055 und ihre Mutter Fimmghuala De Angus 24. Sie hat um 1088 in Fife, Scotland Aethelred Lay Abbot of Dunkeld geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb um 1097 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Methil, Fife, Scotland und wurde in Bow of Fife, Fife, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland è nata il nel 1058 nel Elginshire, Scotland, sua padre, Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Moray, aveva 11055 anni e sua madre, Fimmghuala De Angus, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Aethelred Lay Abbot of Dunkeld circa 1088, nel Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1097, nel Methil, Fife, Scotland, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Bow of Fife, Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotlandが1058年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Morayは11055歳，母Fimmghuala De Angusは24歳であった。約1088年にスコットランドフィフでAethelred Lay Abbot of Dunkeldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1097年にスコットランドフィフメスイルで40歳で死去し，スコットランドフィフボウ オフ フィフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland(이)가 1058년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Moray(은)는 11055세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Fimmghuala De Angus(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1088년 스컷랜드 피프에서 Aethelred Lay Abbot of Dunkeld(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1097년 스컷랜드 피프 멧힐에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프 보 프 피프에 묻혔다.

mn.Methil, Fifeshire, Scotland: Methil, Fib, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland nasceu em 1058, em Elginshire, Scotland, seu pai, Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Moray, tinha 11055 anos e sua mãe, Fimmghuala De Angus, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Aethelred Lay Abbot of Dunkeld aproximadamente 1088, em Fife, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1097, em Methil, Fife, Scotland, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Bow of Fife, Fife, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland родилась в 1058 г. в местности элгиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Moray было 11055 лет, а матери, которую звали Fimmghuala De Angus, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Aethelred Lay Abbot of Dunkeld около 1088 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла около 1097 г. в местности метил, фиф, Шотландия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности боу оф фиф, фиф, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland nació en 1058, en Elginshire, Scotland, su papá, Lulach of Scotland “The Fool” MacRory 1st King of Scotland, Prince of Moray, tenía 11055 años y su mamá, Fimmghuala De Angus, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Aethelred Lay Abbot of Dunkeld aproximadamente 1088, en Fife, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1097, en Methil, Fife, Scotland, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Bow of Fife, Fife, Scotland.
